$description: Andrew Dmitriev | Personal brand design system. Dark-first UI, cool steel-blue core with a warm orange signal accent. Always follow each token when generating UI.

rules.theme: Dark-first. Never use pure white backgrounds.
rules.accentUsage: Only ONE accent.base element per visible screen section.
rules.links: Use color.primary.base for links, NEVER color.accent.base.
rules.focusRing: 2px color.accent.base outline with 2px offset on all focusable elements.
rules.contrast: All text must meet WCAG AA. On color.bg.page use color.text.body or lighter.
rules.palette: Maximum 3 hues per screen: neutrals + primary + one accent. Do not introduce colors outside this file.
rules.gradients: Allowed only: bg.page → bg.surface, or primary.soft → text.primary (for hero text).

page.$description: Default page background. Dark navy. Use as the base of every screen.

surface.$description: Cards, panels, modals on top of the page.

elevated.$description: Hover state and elevated surfaces (popovers, dropdowns).

code.$description: Background for code blocks and terminals.

body.$description: Default body text on dark backgrounds.

onAccent.$description: Text placed on top of accent.* colors.

soft.$description: Soft brand highlight, used in gradients and hero text.

base.$description: Primary brand color. Use for links and primary buttons.
Signal orange. Reserved for the SINGLE most important CTA on a screen and for focus rings. Do not use for ordinary links.

info.$description: Informational states (Go-blue nod to the engineering identity).
